summary.summary: Bumps the development app version constant APP_DEV_VERSION from 0.8.4.9 to 0.8.4.10 in Config.xcconfig (see diff:76c5a7d6b62c and file:10bb1fff9ebd). The commit message is "CI: Bump APP_DEV_VERSION to 0.8.4.10 [skip ci]" (commit:8bac7333c194).
summary.userFacingImpact: This change only updates a development-version constant (APP_DEV_VERSION) in the configuration file; the provided diff and file show no other code or behavior changes (diff:76c5a7d6b62c, file:10bb1fff9ebd). There is no evidence in the supplied sources that this alters runtime behavior or user-visible features, but human review is recommended to confirm no downstream effects (commit:8bac7333c194).
